vietnamese_title: Tự hiện thực hóa, Phần IV
notes: Reviewed first 100 lines. Content appears well-translated. Hermione chasing phoenix glow, 'Sunshine General' translated as 'Ánh Dương tướng quân' (Sunshine General). Somnium spell correctly transliterated. No untranslated English, no obvious omissions, no terminology issues detected.
